title: sessionSummarizer.ts — AI tile summaries (hybrid local→cloud)
description: Reads last 20-30 jsonl events + aiTitle. Hybrid provider: ollama first via sweech auto --provider ollama, fallback to sweech auto --budget 0.005. Writes summary_one/bullets/provider/model/cost/at to sessions.db. Debounced queue; eager every 50 msgs + on session-end; lazy on viewport scroll. SSE summary.updated events.

context.text: Implemented dashboard session summarizer: bounded/contained JSONL digest, local Ollama summary path with explicit cloud opt-in fallback, DB summary writeback, summary.updated SSE, session-end hook, dashboard viewport trigger, and tile rendering for summary/bullets. Proof: focused Jest 8 suites/115 tests passed after merge, tsc passed, build passed, UI screenshot captured and inspected at /Users/luke/Desktop/screenshots/sweech/T-DASH-008-dashboard-summary.png.
